title: Brest, Brittany — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Brest, Brittany: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Brest is a city in Brittany with a population of 140,000. A major Atlantic port city in Brittany with a dramatic coastline, a world-class oceanography institute, and a strong maritime culture.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
